## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Model-semantic changes update documentation and `model_version`
- [ ] Baseline comparison uses identical configs and seeds
- [ ] Generated artifacts and secrets are not committed
